reasoning: The control IR-4 (11) focuses on incident handling and the integration of an incident response team. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logs are enabled and configured to capture security incidents, admission controllers are configured to detect and respond to potential security threats, and service mesh solutions are monitoring traffic for anomalies. These measures help in detecting and responding to incidents within a Kubernetes environment.
title: Incident Handling | Integrated Incident Response Team
